changes: Purify: Resilience will now be granted unconditionally.
Holy Sheltron: Knight's Resolve damage reduction increased from 15% to 20%.
Riddle of Earth: Earth Resonance duration reduced from 10 to 8 seconds.
Goka Mekkyaku: Area of effect radius increased from 5 to 6 yalms.
Tenebrae Lemurum: Enshrouded duration increased from 15 to 20 seconds.
Silent Nocturne: Recast time increased from 20 to 30 seconds.
Empyreal Arrow: Potency reduced from 4,000 to 3,000.
The Warden's Paean: Recast time reduced from 30 to 25 seconds; Barrier duration reduced from 10 to 8 seconds.
Blast Arrow: Potency increased from 8,000 to 10,000.
Honing Ovation: Attack and barrier potency per stack of Acclaim increased from 1,000/2,000/3,000/4,000/5,000 to 2,000/3,000/4,000/5,000/6,000.
Miracle of Nature: Recast time increased from 30 to 45 seconds.

new_content.name: The Gilded Araya
new_content.description: New trial added to the Manderville weapon series.

new_content.name: Main Scenario Quests
new_content.description: Continuation of the Main Scenario Questline starting with 'When One Door Closes...'

new_content.name: Manderville Weapons
new_content.description: Continuation of the Manderville weapon enhancement questline.

new_content.name: Tataru's Grand Endeavor
new_content.description: Continuation of the Tataru's Grand Endeavor questline.

new_content.name: Island Sanctuary
new_content.description: New quests added to Island Sanctuary.

new_content.name: Tribal Alliance Quests
new_content.description: New tribal alliance questline starting with 'Dinner and a Show.'

housing.name: Design Contest Furnishings
housing.description: New furnishings based on the FFXIV Furnishing Design Contest 2019 and 2022.

glamour.name: New Items
glamour.description: New armor, weapons, and fashion accessories added.
